FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Epidemic
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A sickness sweeps through the densely packed city. Workers fall ill by the dozen, and fear grips the populace.
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.optionDescription: Disease is spreading rapidly through the city's crowded districts. The sick cry out for aid while the healthy flee indoors. What are your orders?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Quarantine the affected districts. Contain it at any cost.
Distribute medicine freely to all citizens.
Let it run its course. The strong will survive.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: District Quarantine
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Entire city blocks have been sealed off. The disease is contained, but productivity has cratered as workers are confined to their homes.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Medicine Distributed
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Healers and herbalists work around the clock, distributing remedies to the afflicted. The epidemic subsides quickly, and citizens are grateful for the intervention.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Epidemic Unchecked
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Without intervention, the disease has ravaged the city. The death toll mounts, and survivors are bitter about the lack of response.
